briefdescription.para: Minimum confidence score for match acceptance (sensor-specific range)
Minimum quality score for enrollment acceptance (sensor-specific range)
Security level (1-10), higher values reduce false accepts.
Last captured image quality score (sensor-specific range), read-only.
Number of all common biometric attributes.
This and higher values are sensor specific.

detaileddescription.para: Refer to the sensor header file.

briefdescription.para: Maximum value describing a biometric attribute type.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to capabilities structure to populate

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum biometric_attribute attr, int32_t val)
memberdef.name: biometric_attr_set

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum biometric_attribute attr, int32_t *val)
memberdef.name: biometric_attr_get

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the attribute value

detaileddescription.para: Begins enrollment for a new template. After calling this, use biometric_enroll_capture() to capture samples, then biometric_enroll_finalize() to complete, or biometric_enroll_abort() to cancel.

parameterdescription.para: Template ID to assign (1-based: valid range is 1 to max_templates)
Invalid template_id or enrollment in progress

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, k_timeout_t timeout, struct biometric_capture_result *result)
memberdef.name: biometric_enroll_capture

detaileddescription.para: Captures a sample for enrollment. This function blocks until a sample is captured or the timeout expires. Call this function multiple times (typically twice) to collect all required samples before finalizing enrollment.

parameterdescription.para: Optional pointer to capture result structure for progress/quality info. Pass NULL if not needed.
No enrollment started or already have enough samples
Other negative errno code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Completes enrollment and stores the template.
Cancels ongoing enrollment and resets enrollment state.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t id, const uint8_t *data, size_t size)
memberdef.name: biometric_template_store

detaileddescription.para: Stores a pre-generated template. Used for host-based storage systems or restoring backed-up templates.

parameterdescription.para: Size of template data in bytes

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t id, uint8_t *data, size_t size)
memberdef.name: biometric_template_read

detaileddescription.para: Retrieves template data. The data buffer must be allocated by caller with sufficient size (check capabilities for template_size).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to buffer for template data
Invalid template_id or buffer too small

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t *ids, size_t max_count, size_t *actual_count)
memberdef.name: biometric_template_list

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to array to populate with template IDs
Maximum number of IDs array can hold
Pointer to store actual number of IDs returned

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum biometric_match_mode mode, uint16_t template_id, k_timeout_t timeout, struct biometric_match_result *result)
memberdef.name: biometric_match

detaileddescription.para: Captures a sample and performs matching. This function blocks until matching completes or timeout expires. For BIOMETRIC_MATCH_VERIFY, verifies against template_id. For BIOMETRIC_MATCH_IDENTIFY, searches all templates.

parameterdescription.para: Template ID for verify mode (ignored in identify mode)
Timeout for sample capture and matching
Optional pointer to match result structure for detailed info. Pass NULL if only match/no-match status is needed.
Other negative errno code on failure

detaileddescription.para: Controls LED state for user feedback during operations.
